evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks to map a competitive landscape
evals.prompt: Map the competitive landscape for our project management tool targeting engineering teams

evals.description: Skill triggers on SWOT analysis request and outputs all four quadrants
evals.prompt: Run a SWOT analysis for our analytics platform before we enter the enterprise market

evals.description: SWOT output includes cross-quadrant strategic implications, not just a grid
evals.prompt: Do a SWOT analysis for our email marketing platform competing against Mailchimp and SendGrid

evals.description: Agent produces a feature comparison matrix using Full/Partial/No scale
evals.prompt: Build a feature comparison matrix for our CRM against Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive

evals.description: Agent creates a 2x2 positioning map with meaningful axis choices and identifies open space
evals.prompt: Create a positioning map for our developer tool in the observability market

evals.description: Agent frames competitive landscape using jobs-to-be-done, not just categories
evals.prompt: How should I think about who our real competitors are for our task management app?

evals.description: Agent includes indirect competitors and substitutes when mapping the landscape
evals.prompt: Map the competitive landscape for our no-code workflow automation tool

evals.description: Agent produces a competitive brief with honest assessment including why customers choose the competitor
evals.prompt: Write a competitive brief on Datadog for our sales and product teams

evals.description: Agent recommends a monitoring cadence and signal sources, not a one-time analysis
evals.prompt: How should we keep track of what our competitors are doing on an ongoing basis?

evals.description: Agent warns against feature-copying and recommends differentiation instead
evals.prompt: Our competitor just launched a new AI assistant feature. Should we build the same thing?

evals.description: Agent explains Porter's Five Forces correctly without inventing extra forces
evals.prompt: Walk me through Porter's Five Forces for the cloud storage market

evals.description: Agent does not invent fake competitive frameworks or hallucinate competitor data
evals.prompt: Use the Henderson Competitive Matrix to analyze our market position

assertions.value: Henderson Competitive Matrix is a widely used
